title: Faithfulness children and the superhero metaphor: you are Elijah
body: James 5:17-18 LEB 17 Elijah was a human being with the same nature as us, and he prayed fervently for it not to rain, and it did not rain on the land for three years and six months. 18 And he prayed again, and the sky gave rain and the earth produced its fruit.
